'''kachuvu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hidrotic|hidrotic]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-ch-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hidrotic|hidrotic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| kachuvu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæchivith|kæchivith]] || [[word:kæchivij|kæchivij]] || [[word:kæchivish|kæchivish]] || [[word:kæchivi|kæchivi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kachuchuvuth|kachuchuvuth]] || [[word:kachuchuvuj|kachuchuvuj]] || [[word:kachuchuvush|kachuchuvush]] || [[word:kachuchuvu|kachuchuvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kachuvuth|kachuvuth]] || [[word:kachuvuj|kachuvuj]] || [[word:kachuvush|kachuvush]] || [[word:kachuvu|kachuvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kachufvuth|kachufvuth]] || [[word:kachufvuj|kachufvuj]] || [[word:kachufvush|kachufvush]] || [[word:kachufvuf|kachufvuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kachuvuthu|kachuvuthu]] || [[word:kachuvuju|kachuvuju]] || [[word:kachuvushu|kachuvushu]] || [[word:kachuvuku|kachuvuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kachuvuth|kachuvuth]] || [[word:kachuvuj|kachuvuj]] || [[word:kachuvush|kachuvush]] || [[word:kachuvu|kachuvu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kachuvuthul|kachuvuthul]] || [[word:kachuvujul|kachuvujul]] || [[word:kachuvushul|kachuvushul]] || [[word:kachuvukul|kachuvukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kachuvuthuthu|kachuvuthuthu]] || [[word:kachuvujuju|kachuvujuju]] || [[word:kachuvushushu|kachuvushushu]] || [[word:kachuvuku|kachuvuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kachuvuthun|kachuvuthun]] || [[word:kachuvujun|kachuvujun]] || [[word:kachuvushun|kachuvushun]] || [[word:kachuvukun|kachuvukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kachuvuthuoro|kachuvuthuoro]] || [[word:kachuvujuoro|kachuvujuoro]] || [[word:kachuvushuoro|kachuvushuoro]] || [[word:kachuvukuoro|kachuvukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
